Compliance, walked through

SwanReady

From documentation to report

two minutes, with music

The promise

An eco-label is a promise.

The reality

Proving it means weeks of paperwork.

The risk

And the one missing certificate surfaces too late.

The answer

Meet SwanReady.

A conversational compliance agent for eco-labels.

The solution

The fast, intelligent way through.

Six steps. One afternoon.

The method

  1. Import the rules
  2. Ask, with receipts
  3. Build the dossier
  4. Run the judgement
  5. Review every verdict
  6. Export the report

01 · The rulebook

Official criteria become a living checklist.

02 · Ask anything

Every answer cites the rule.

03 · The evidence

Drop in the dossier, folder by folder.

04 · The run

Every requirement judged against your evidence — in minutes.

05 · Your call

A person reads, questions, and owns every verdict.

06 · Close the gap

Add the missing file. Re-run. Ready.

07 · The deliverable

A certifier-grade report, ready to submit.

The stance

Never “met” without evidence.

When proof is thin, SwanReady says “needs review” — not “yes”.

Why it matters

Weeks become an afternoon.

Traceable by design

Every verdict cites its rule.

See it run

The full story, start to finish.
